channel.title: Deployment on Adriaan Knapen
channel.description: Recent content in Deployment on Adriaan Knapen

item.title: Continuous Deploy your own Matrix instance
item.description: Bye Whatsapp A while ago I decided to move away from Whatsapp and Telegram in favor of Matrix, mostly to imporve my privacy and get more control over my own data - yes Whatsapp, I’m looking at your limited backup options. But enough about the idealistic tech vision and more about tech itself. To get the most out of Matrix it is best to deploy an instance for yourself. It’s quite an involved process, however luckily there’s an Ansible playbook which does most of the heavy lifting for you.
